Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class CollectionVerifierImpl<C extends Collection<E>,E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<CollectionVerifier<C,E>,CollectionValidator<C,E>,C>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.CollectionVerifierImpl<C,E>
Type Parameters:
C - the type of the collection
E - the type of elements in the collection
All Implemented Interfaces:
CollectionVerifier<C,E>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<CollectionVerifier<C,E>,C>
public final class CollectionVerifierImpl<C extends Collection<E>,E> extends AbstractObjectVerifier<CollectionVerifier<C,E>,CollectionValidator<C,E>,C> implements CollectionVerifier<C,E>
An implementation of CollectionVerifier.

      Ensures that the actual value contains an element.

      Parameters:
      element - the element that must exist
      Returns:

    • contains

      public CollectionVerifier<C,E> contains(E element, String name)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value contains an element.
      Specified by:
      contains in interface CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      element - the element that must exist
      name - the name of the expected element
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • containsExactly

      public CollectionVerifier<C,E> containsExactly(Collection<E> expected)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value contains exactly the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more. This method is equivalent to an equality comparison that ignores element ordering.
      Specified by:
      containsExactly in interface CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      expected - the elements that must exist
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • containsExactly

      public CollectionVerifier<C,E> containsExactly(Collection<E> expected, String name)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value contains exactly the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more. This method is equivalent to an equality comparison that ignores element ordering.
      Specified by:
      containsExactly in interface CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:
      expected - the elements that must exist
      name - the name of the expected elements
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

      Ensures that the actual value contains any of specified elements.
      Specified by:
      containsAny in interface CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,E>
      Parameters:

      Returns:

    • size

      public CollectionVerifier<C,E> size(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionVerifier
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.

      Parameters:
